blockers.description: Anthropic API billing status unknown — Blocker Refresh cron (3fa57eec) runs but verify no payment blocks active.
blockers.action: Log into https://console.anthropic.com/account/billing. Confirm credit balance > $0. If depleted, add credits immediately. Monitor cron run logs for payment errors.

blockers.description: Pulse Daily Intel (6 AM) delivered successfully but audit log missing — verify output file exists and contains valid content.
blockers.action: Check if /PULSE_DAILY_OUTPUT.md exists with today's date. If missing or stale (>24h old), run Detective Niessen audit on cron job ea9220d2. If found, mark DONE.

blockers.description: Search Console — atlas.opsman@gmail.com not added as property user for SCC/HUSA and Newton properties.
blockers.action: Go to Google Search Console → Settings → Users and Permissions. Add atlas.opsman@gmail.com with Viewer or Editor role for both properties. Verify access within 5 min.

blockers.description: OAuth redirect_uri_mismatch blocking local dev auth flow. 127.0.0.1 callback not registered in Google Cloud Console.
blockers.action: Go to console.cloud.google.com → APIs & Services → Credentials → OAuth 2.0 Client IDs → Add http://127.0.0.1:PORT to Authorized redirect URIs. Save. Test callback.

blockers.description: Dime guest booking — Micah Anderson (LEEF Brands, Prop 64 expert, recent guest 2026-03-08) HIGH priority pitch target. Email draft ready. Zero outreach sent.
blockers.action: Send warm email to Micah Anderson referencing his recent Dime episode + Newton Insights fit. Template: reference extraction ops pain + feedback loop visibility. Subject: 'Quick thought on your Prop 64 insights + Newton tool' (max 5 days lag from appearance).

blockers.description: Newton CRM Warm Prospects tab not updated with recent outreach. Last touch dates stale (>7 days). Hunter CRM protocol incomplete.
blockers.action: Execute Hunter CRM Cell Update Protocol (STANDING_INSTRUCTIONS.md): (1) Append recent outreach to Outreach Log tab. (2) Update Last Touch dates in Warm Prospects using gws sheets batchUpdate. (3) Report rows updated + verification.

blockers.description: DRAFTS folder system not formalized. 1 item in /DRAFTS/ (OLG_LinkedIn_TilrayBrewDog_20260305.md) lacks tracking or review status.
blockers.action: Create DRAFTS_STATUS.json: track file name | created_date | type (post/email/doc/analysis) | owner | status (pending-review/approved/rejected). Add daily 6 AM blocker board task to check /DRAFTS/ and update status.

blockers.description: OLG LinkedIn post draft (Tilray/BrewDog) in /DRAFTS/OLG_LinkedIn_TilrayBrewDog_20260305.md awaiting Bryan review. Created 2026-03-05 (19 days old).
blockers.action: Review draft in /DRAFTS/. Approve for posting, request revisions, or reject. If approved, Olg posts to LinkedIn. If stale (>14 days), flag for rejection or refresh.

blockers.description: VERCEL_TOKEN not stored in environment. Atlas cannot trigger manual deploys or verify env vars without browser auth.
blockers.action: Go to vercel.com/account/tokens → Create Personal Access Token → Add to ~/.openclaw/.env as VERCEL_TOKEN=<token>. Verify: echo $VERCEL_TOKEN should output token.

blockers.description: Agent SOUL.md files missing for 9 agents — OLG, Rob_C, Hunter, Dr. Frankl, Ledger, Voss, Bob, Niessen, Spark scaffolded but empty. Blocks identity + role clarity.
blockers.action: Provide 3-5 identity traits per agent (name, role, core trait, vibe, standard). Atlas drafts SOUL.md for each and stages in ~/.agents/skills/. Or Bryan writes identity bullets directly in Slack.
